rollingHandoffIn: Raul Menendez and David are in a tense standoff. The dialogue suggests a personal conflict between them. The next chunk will likely continue their confrontation.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Raul Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: You have no idea what you've done.

dialogue_segments.speaker: David
dialogue_segments.text: I know exactly what I've done, Menendez.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Raul Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: This is just the beginning of your suffering.

parsed.summary: Menendez taunts David about his actions, claiming it is only the beginning of his suffering. David ignores the taunt and attempts to contact Specter One for a situation report.
parsed.handoffContext: Raul Menendez and David are still in a standoff. David is trying to establish communication with his team (Specter One) while Menendez continues his psychological games.
